- Replaced the Bootstrap accordion in Turnir Details with native `<details>` sections.

Verification: normal build was blocked because your running app has the output DLL/exe locked, so I validated with an isolated output path:

`dotnet build SustavZaOrganizacijuNogometnihTurnira/SustavZaOrganizacijuNogometnihTurnira.csproj --no-restore /p:OutputPath=../artifacts/verify-build/ /p:UseAppHost=false`

Result: build succeeded with `0` warnings and `0` errors.

1. Run the project on your side and check the Home hero crop at desktop/mobile widths.
2. Add active navigation highlighting if you want the current section to stand out in the header.
